mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which drives higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rolling 2-year Rank IC of INDPRO on 20-day forward returns below 0.03 or negative hit ratio in expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate above a low base signals the onset of a recessionary labor market, reducing consumer spending and corporate profits, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises above 4.0% within 3 months of being below 4.0%
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered instances or Sharpe ratio not significantly below unconditional.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent high inflation and rising interest rates compress equity valuations by increasing discount rates and reducing real earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Average 20-day return in triggered periods is positive or rank IC of interaction term is below 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts signal real estate activity that boosts economic growth in an easing rate environment but contracts demand when rates rise, so forward returns are positive in easing and negative in tightening.
failure_condition: Direction of HOUST effect on 20-day returns does not flip sign between easing and tightening regimes as defined by FEDFUNDS thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: An abrupt monthly decline in retail sales signals a sudden drop in consumer demand, which often precedes negative revisions to earnings forecasts and a near-term sell-off in equities over the upcoming week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns in more than 40% of triggered events or average return is not statistically negative at 95% confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in industrial production and payroll employment indicates broad-based economic momentum that supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day returns in triggered periods are not positive on average with t-stat > 2.0, or interaction IC below 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently low unemployment indicates a tight labor market that boosts consumption and corporate profits, supporting a positive equity risk premium and higher S&P 500 returns over the short term.
failure_condition: Rolling 2-year correlation of UNRATE level with 20-day forward returns is positive, or IC remains below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts below a key threshold signals weakening residential investment and broader economic contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered months or average return not significantly negative.
